concepts.operational_trust: The degree to which leadership can rely on controls, ownership, evidence, AI boundaries, and incident readiness to make defensible decisions.
concepts.executive_briefing: A concise translation of what changed, why it matters, operational consequence, recommended action, confidence, and owner.
concepts.action_orchestration: Continuous prioritization of unresolved governance work based on severity, urgency, governance age, evidence confidence, operational impact, compliance sensitivity, and executive visibility.
concepts.organizational_memory: Persistent continuity layer for unresolved risks, accepted risks, remediation history, evidence age, policy revision, report history, and maturity progression.
concepts.scenario_proof: Simulated but coherent demonstration of telemetry becoming narrative, consequence, decision guidance, and board-ready reporting.
